title: Map a Rhetoric & Persuasion system
description: Build a starter systems map that explains how rhetoric & persuasion works in one real setting.
whyItMatters: This turns the starter content into something you can reason with instead of just read once.

steps.title: Pick one setting
steps.description: Choose a real institution, market, technology, or human problem where rhetoric & persuasion shows up.

steps.title: Map the system
steps.description: Identify inputs, mechanisms, stakeholders, constraints, and outcomes.

steps.title: Explain the trade-offs
steps.description: Write down the main tensions and where judgment matters.

rubric.description: The system can be understood quickly.
The map reflects real mechanisms and constraints.
